textures.name: car_interior
textures.prompt: Generate high‑resolution texture set for train interior: albedo (diffuse) stained wallpaper, chipped paint, varnished wood, rust streaks; normal map with surface scratches and bumps; roughness map with variation; AO map baked from highpoly. Provide 2048x2048 PNG sources. For final mobile build prepare ASTC 4x4 and ETC2 variants.

textures.name: erich_face
textures.prompt: Photorealistic male face albedo with age details (wrinkles, blemishes), subsurface scattering map if supported, 2048x2048 PNG. Provide matching normal, roughness, AO. Keep neutral expression for maptouches.
